//: Remote control-plane MCP server (AgentCore Runtime, Cognito-authed). Uses Claude Code's built-in OAuth flow — NO static Authorization header (a static header disables OAuth fallback and breaks on token expiry). On connect the runtime returns 401 + RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata, Claude Code discovers the Cognito authorization server, and runs an authorization-code+PKCE browser flow; tokens are stored in your keychain and auto-refreshed. Cognito has no Dynamic Client Registration, so we pin a pre-registered client_id below; supply its secret once (it's a confidential client): `claude mcp login sunstead-control` (or `claude mcp add ... --client-secret`) — the secret lives in your keychain, never in this file. Secret is in dashboard_client.secret at the repo root. callbackPort 8080 must match the http://localhost:8080/callback redirect registered on the Cognito client.
